hero.title: Control the urban flow.
hero.subtitle: Analyze, simulate and optimize traffic in real time using AI. The dedicated platform for the smart cities of tomorrow.

problem.label: The problem
problem.title: Cities lack visibility and control.
problem.desc: In modern metropolises, mobility flows have become uncontrollable. Existing tools are archaic, reactive, and expensive.

items.title: Time lost
items.desc: A driver loses an average of 200 hours per year in urban traffic jams.

items.title: Operational inefficiency
items.desc: Traffic lights operate with fixed cycles unsuited to actual traffic.

items.title: Unused data
items.desc: Collected mobility data is not analyzed or used for optimization.

solution.label: The solution
solution.title: A unified intelligence platform.
solution.desc: CrossFlow merges computer vision and predictive models for proactive management.

items.title: Real-Time Analysis
items.desc: Massive ingestion of IoT and camera feeds with processing latency <50ms.

items.title: Scenario Simulation
items.desc: Test the impact of lane closures or major events before implementation.

items.title: Autonomous Decision
items.desc: AI dynamically adjusts signal cycles to maximize flow and reduce CO₂.

impact.label: Measurable Impact
impact.title: Concrete results, on the ground.
impact.desc: Deployed in 12 European metropolises with immediate benefits.

useCases.label: Use cases
useCases.title: One solution, for every urban challenge.
useCases.desc: Our technology adapts to the specific needs of each territory.

items.title: City Center Management
items.desc: Reduce saturation during peak hours and special events.

items.title: Multi-modal Mobility
items.desc: Streamline transfers between buses, streetcars and micro-mobility.

items.title: Urban Logistics
items.desc: Optimize the last mile for B2B delivery players.

about.label: The company
about.title: Building the future of agile mobility.
about.desc: CrossFlow Mobility is a DeepTech startup founded in Paris, dedicated to the digital transformation of transport infrastructure.

contact.label: Contact & Support
contact.title: Ready to optimize your network?
contact.desc: Contact our experts for a personalized demonstration.

form.name: Full Name
form.privacy: By sending this form, you accept our privacy policy.

copilot.label: AI Copilot
copilot.title: Your AI assistant for every decision.
copilot.desc: CrossFlow AI understands your data, anticipates disruptions, and generates actionable recommendations. Ask your questions in natural language.
copilot.welcome: Hello! I am CrossFlow AI. I can analyze your traffic data, simulate scenarios, and recommend optimal actions in real time.

conversations.user: Simulate a traffic peak at 6 PM
conversations.ai:
Simulation launched for 6 PM. I am analyzing current flows and projecting a +67% volume increase on main routes.

→ 3 critical intersections identified: North Station, City Center, South Ring Road.

→ Recommendation: activate 'Rush Hour' plan at 8 intersections, prepare alternative routes B3 and C7.

conversations.user: What is the best strategy for the North-South axis?
conversations.ai:
After analyzing historical data (30 days) and weather forecasts:

→ 15s green light extension on the North-South axis from 5:30 PM to 7 PM.
→ Activation of reversible lanes on Boulevard Haussmann.
→ Preventive diversion of 18% of the flow to the A86.

Estimated gain: -22% waiting time, +340 additional vehicles/h.

Weekly report generated ✓

→ Overall congestion reduction: -18.3%
→ Carbon savings: 4.2 tons CO₂
→ Automatically handled incidents: 14/14
→ User satisfaction: +12 NPS points

PDF report available. Would you like to send it to stakeholders?

demo.title: Take control of the traffic.
demo.desc: Interact with a real simulation of our urban management interface.
demo.note: Note: The data presented is simulated for demonstration purposes.

metadata.title: CrossFlow Mobility | AI for Intelligent Urban Traffic Management
metadata.description: Revolutionary AI platform for smart cities. Optimize urban mobility, reduce congestion and simulate the future of transport in real-time with CrossFlow.
metadata.keywords: Urban AI, Smart City, Urban Mobility, Traffic Management, Urban Simulation, Intelligent City, Transport Optimization, Real-time AI
